generated_oml:
// ---------- Sensing Components ----------
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor I_M on the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CNCPositionFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position feedback (output angle) from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// ---------- Data Transmitted (raw) ----------
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CNCPositionFeedbackSensor
]

// ---------- Data Transmitted (derived) ----------
instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
                        GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted, CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
                        CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
                        CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// ---------- Data ----------
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped motor current trace (float array) from I_M sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor encoder angle trace (float array) from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder angle trace (float array) from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle trace (float array) from CNC controller feedback"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CNCPositionFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque trace (float array) calculated from raw sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity trace (float array) calculated from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration trace (float array) calculated from encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

// ---------- Models ----------
instance SysMLStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagram describing the motor‑gearbox structure of the MABI MAX 100 first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelLugre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box LuGre friction model used in the Simulink simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model (including Stribeck and Dahl) for parameter identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink calculation model that derives torque, angular velocity and acceleration from raw sensor traces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

// ---------- Enablers ----------
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for executing simulation and calculation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionParameterGenerationService,
                 DataVisualizationService, DataComparisonService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for live streaming of time‑stamped sensor data"
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integration layer for model exchange between physical asset and digital shadow"
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for visualizing measured and simulated traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, DataComparisonService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink data processing engine that performs friction identification and parameter generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionParameterGenerationService
]

// ---------- Services ----------
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, GenerateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated data traces in a web dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeDataComparisonAction
]

instance DataComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of reference (measured) versus simulated behavior, highlighting deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationInsight, UpdateRobotControllerAction
]

instance FrictionParameterGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of updated friction model parameters for feeding back into the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedCoefficientsInsight, UpdateRobotControllerAction
]

// ---------- Insights ----------
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) from the digital shadow"
]

instance DeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Highlighted deviations between simulated and measured behavior for engineering decisions"
]

instance UpdatedCoefficientsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model coefficients ready to be uploaded to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
]

// ---------- Actions ----------
instance GenerateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateRobotControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed updated friction coefficients back into the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeDataComparisonAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Display side‑by‑side comparison of measured and simulated traces on the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a one‑way passive model and does not send commands or data back to the robot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow constellation consists of the purpose element (FrictionDerivation), the asset element (MABI robot first axis), data trace elements (I_M, r_M, r_G, r_out, ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out), processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that run the Simulink models, and metadata linking sources to traces, all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability is achieved by linking each data point to its originating source and processing component; both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models are calibrated continuously using live data, allowing multi‑physics‑aware identification and validation of model predictions against measured traces."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; the document does not specify additional protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation uses the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for model encapsulation and follows standard MBSE practices (SysML) and simulation standards (MATLAB/Simulink)."
]
